title: Bad Mobs
description: This mod provides a simple way to disable any way mob spawning in Minecraft. This is a community port of the original BadMobs mod for Fabric 1.21.1. Once installed, you can modify the generated config file to disable spawning behavior
body:
**BadMobs (Fabric 1.21.1) - Community Port**

This mod provides a simple way to **disable any way mob spawning** in Minecraft. This is a **community port of the original BadMobs mod** for Fabric 1.21.1.
 
Once installed, you can modify the generated config file to disable spawning behavior.

### Usage Guide

1. Download the mod and Fabric API. Install it in your `mods` folder.
2. Run the game or server once. After it has loaded, close the game or use command `/badmobs set`.
2.1. Locate the `badmobs.json` config in your `config` folder.
3. Open the config file with a text editor. Every registered mob has options pregenerated for you.
4. Modify the file to your liking, save it, and start the game again or use command `/badmobs reload`.
